items.title: U.S. begins blockade in Strait of Hormuz; Trump warns Iran 'attack ships' to stay away
items.summary: The U.S. blockade would apply to "any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz," President Donald Trump said.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: Fed nominee Warsh clears a hurdle to Senate hearing
items.summary: Kevin Warsh submitted required ethics paperwork to the Senate Monday.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: Oracle expands Bloom Energy deal days after receiving $400 million stock warrant
items.summary: Last week Oracle received a warrant to buy nearly $400 million in Bloom Energy's stock, which jumped on Monday after the companies announced an expanded deal.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: Oracle pops nearly 13%, leading bounce back rally in software stocks
items.summary: Oracle has lost more than a fifth of its value this year on AI disruption concerns.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: The Iran war is compounding California's energy crunch
items.summary: While the United States leans into its domestic crude oil production, one state is being left out to dry, California.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: BlackRock raises view on U.S. stocks on belief that war is over, profits are up
items.summary: The firm, which manages $14 trillion for clients, said in its weekly market note that it raised the rating a notch to overweight from neutral.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: Middle East oil production plunges due to Iran war, OPEC data shows
items.summary: The Gulf Arab states have cut production because they are unable to export through the Strait of Hormuz due to the war.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis

items.title: Pope Leo says 'I have no fear of the Trump administration' after president blasts pontiff
items.summary: Pope Leo has condemned the war against Iran by the United States and Israel, drawing the ire of President Donald Trump.
items.source: US Top News and Analysis
